title: stachys alpigena subsp. alpigena
intro: Stachys alpigena subsp. alpigena, also known as alpine betony, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of alpine betony include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. Alpine betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
